name: goal-setter
description: Shape rough requests into Codex goals that define the expected result, Done checks, verification, constraints, stop rules, and when to use subagents or create_thread.

interface.shortDescription: Codex goals with Done checks and run rules
interface.longDescription: Turns a rough request into a compact /goal for Codex: expected result, Done checks, verification, constraints, stop rules, and whether to use subagents, create_thread, or a user-sent /goal line for parallel work. It asks only when missing information would change the result, evidence, scope, validation, or risk.
defaultPrompt: Set a goal: define the expected result, Done checks, verification, constraints, and how Codex should run it.
Draft a Codex-ready goal for this task without activating it.
Shape this splittable work into a goal that structures the independent pieces for parallel execution.
